tldr: Christopher, roughly a dozen of your live ads use the exact same body copy word-for-word, and your top headline runs on five different ads at once. Meta treats these near-identical ads as basically one, so you paid to make ads that almost no one sees.

benchmark.context: Most brands your size swap in fresh ads every three weeks. The best ones do it every two. You have several ads still running past 75 days with copy that's already copied across five other live ads.

ads.headline: WHY EVERYONE IS REACHING FOR STRIVE RIGHT NOW
ads.body: Some drinks feel refreshing at first… then leave you feeling heavy. Strive was made to feel different. Sweetened with honey and infused with electrolytes for hydration, it delivers crisp carbonation and balanced flavor in a lighter soda you can actually enjoy. Refreshing, easy to drink, and designed for active days. That's why more people are reaching for Strive.
drivers: This exact headline and body run word-for-word on four other live ads right now.
It's been running for 76 days straight, more than five times what a brand your size should hold.
Meta sees these five copies as one ad and quietly stops showing four of them, so your spend on the extras is burning.

ads.headline: WHY EVERYONE IS REACHING FOR STRIVE RIGHT NOW
ads.body: Some drinks feel refreshing at first… then leave you feeling heavy. Strive was made to feel different. Sweetened with honey and infused with electrolytes for hydration, it delivers crisp carbonation and balanced flavor in a lighter soda you can actually enjoy. Refreshing, easy to drink, and designed for active days. That's why more people are reaching for Strive.
drivers: A direct twin of another live ad running the same day, same wording, same image style.
The opening line 'Some drinks feel refreshing at first' is now over 10 weeks old and worn out.
Every day this stays live, it competes with its own copies for the same viewers.

ads.headline: No Fake Sugars. Just Real Hydration
ads.body: Ditch the sugar crash without sacrificing flavor. Strive Soda delivers bold soda taste with 0 sugar, 0 calories, and real ingredients. Try all fan-favorite flavors in the Variety Pack - your new go-to refreshment.
drivers: The 'No Fake Sugars' headline runs on six of your live ads with almost the same body.
89 days old, more than four times how long an ad like this should live.
The body claims '0 calories' while another live ad with the same headline says '45 calories' - that mixed message trains buyers to distrust the label.

ads.headline: No Fake Sugars. Just Real Hydration
ads.body: Ditch the sugar crash without sacrificing flavor. Strive Soda delivers bold soda taste with 0 sugar, 0 calories, and real ingredients. Try all fan-favorite flavors in the Variety Pack - your new go-to refreshment.
drivers: Same wording as five other live ads, but this one points to the Tropical page while its twins point to the Variety Pack.
That split confuses Meta about which page you actually want traffic on, so both pages get less.
86 days old, way past the point where the opening line still stops a thumb.

ads.headline: Zero Sugar. Full Flavor.
ads.body: Ditch the sugar crash without sacrificing flavor. Strive Soda delivers bold soda taste with 0 sugar, 0 calories, and real ingredients. Try all fan-favorite flavors in the Variety Pack - your new go-to refreshment.
drivers: New headline, but the body copy is copied word-for-word from six other live ads.
Meta doesn't care that the headline changed if the paragraph underneath is identical.
89 days live, so the buyers who might have bought already saw this one many times.

ads_compact.headline: Get 15% OFF now
ads_compact.body: Win $100+ Worth of Strive Soda + Get 15% OFF Today. Here's how it works: enter your email, get 15% off instantly, then place your first order to automatically enter the quarterly drawing.

ads_compact.headline: Upgrade Your Hydration
ads_compact.body: Still reaching for old-school sports drinks? Try a hydration soda made for workdays, gym sessions, beach days, and everything in between. Strive delivers full flavor, honey-only sweetness, and 180mg of electrolytes.

ads_compact.headline: Daily Soda, Upgraded With Function
ads_compact.body: Soda is part of your daily routine. Now it can do more than just taste good. Strive is a better-for-you hydration soda made with 180mg essential electrolytes, 100% organic wildflower honey, and only 45 calories per can.

hero_concept.headline: Fizz that hydrates back.
hero_concept.primary_text:
Most sodas leave you flat by 3pm. Strive Peach was built the other way - 180mg of electrolytes, real wildflower honey, 45 calories a can.

One sip: crisp peach, clean finish, no sticky aftertaste. It's the swap your afternoon has been waiting for.

Grab the Peach 12-pack today. 20% off your first order with code HONEY20.
hero_concept.visual_direction: A single chilled Strive Peach can on a sunlit kitchen counter with condensation dripping down the side, one ice cube mid-splash beside it, peach slices in soft focus behind.
hero_concept.fills_gap: Every one of your live ads talks about hydration in the abstract - 'crisp carbonation', 'balanced flavor', 'bridges that gap'. None of them show a single close-up of the actual can with the drink looking cold and thirst-making. You're selling a beverage without a mouth-watering shot.
hero_concept.image_prompt: A photorealistic editorial product photograph featuring the product from the reference image, styled in a sunlit kitchen counter scene with a single chilled Strive Peach 12oz can standing upright, fresh peach slices arranged in soft focus behind it, one ice cube captured mid-splash beside the can, water droplets and condensation running down the aluminum, with warm golden natural side-lighting mimicking late morning window light that catches the condensation and makes the can glow. Clean modern beverage-brand aesthetic, bright and appetizing, shallow depth of field. Square 1:1 composition with breathing room top and bottom for ad text overlay. CRITICAL - preserve the exact peach-orange and cream colorway of the Strive Peach can, the aluminum finish, and every printed graphic, logo, and text element exactly as they appear on the can in the reference image, including the 'Strive' wordmark, the 'Peach' flavor label, the honey/electrolyte callouts, nutritional icons, and any secondary text - strictly NO color shift, NO removing or altering of any printed graphic or text, NO gold or brown tone bias. STRUCTURE - preserve the exact construction: standard 12oz slim aluminum can silhouette, single pull-tab top, rolled rim at top and bottom, unopened seal, all printed artwork wrapping the can exactly as shown in the reference. Do NOT change the can shape, do NOT open the tab, do NOT add extra text or badges, do NOT remove any of the printed brand elements, do NOT alter the flavor label or callouts. Render the product's metal, color, finish, fabric, weave, stones, surface treatment, AND every visible construction detail (silhouette, closures, hardware count, pockets, sleeves, neckline, printed graphics) EXACTLY as they appear in the reference image. Do NOT change the metal type, do NOT shift the color temperature, do NOT introduce tones not present in the reference, do NOT add or remove buttons, snaps, zippers, pockets, straps, or any hardware, do NOT alter the silhouette, do NOT remove or modify printed graphics or text on the garment. IMPORTANT: the 'no text' and 'no logos' items in the NEGATIVE list below apply ONLY to text or logos added as overlay to the photograph itself - text, logos, graphics, prints, and brand labels that exist ON the product in the reference image are part of the product and must be preserved exactly. Premium commerce photography quality. NEGATIVE: no overlay text added to the photograph, no overlay logos added to the photograph, no watermarks, no UI elements, no Facebook interface, no clickable buttons, no faces, no models, no collage, no borders, no duplicate products, no color shift, no metal swap, no silver-to-gold or gold-to-silver conversion, no warm-tone bias on cool metals, no recoloring of fabric or stones, no pattern modifications, no removing or replacing the product's printed graphics, no extra hardware not present in reference, no added pockets or pleats, no silhouette alterations, no design modifications.

next_step.urgency: About half a dozen of your ads are days away from Meta showing them to almost no one - the oldest could go dark this week.
next_step.headline: Walk through the Strive Soda refresh plan with Kyle
next_step.body:
Christopher, in this 30 min call, we'll map out:
• 3 customer avatars at your price point
• The motivational hook driving each
• A 30-day creative + spend roadmap (to outbeat your current ROAS)

Yours to keep - work with us or don't.

method_note: Based only on your public Facebook and Instagram ads: the pictures, the words, and how long each one has been running. No access to your account or private numbers.
